name: Spring Rolls (Chinese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl.
2. Place about 3 egg roll wrappers on your work surface.
3. Spoon the filling mixture onto the center of each wrapper, leaving space for folding.
4. Fold the long side of the wrapper over the filling, then fold in the sides.
5. Roll tightly from one end to seal completely with water or beaten egg white.
6. Repeat until all wrappers are used.
7. Heat oil in a deep pan or wok to 375°F (190°C).
8. Fry the rolls in batches for about 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
10. This recipe makes approximately 6 to 12 spring rolls depending on the amount of filling used.
